name: Avatar Franchise RPG | Avatar: The Last Airbender The Legend of Korra The Kyoshi Novels The Yangchen Novels The Legend of Korra: Beginnings Post-War Comics — The Promise Post-War Comics — Smoke and Shadow
description:
Avatar: The Complete Franchise RPG!!! Shows! Comics! Novels! Everything![184k+ token lorebook | 374+ entries]

"Ten thousand years of reincarnated consequence are about to intersect with your next breath."

This is not a game. This is the living world of Avatar. Welcome to the most comprehensive, mechanically brutal, and spiritually authentic Avatar RPG ever constructed. Powered by a 13,000+ TOKEN PERMANENT LOGIC ENGINE and anchored by a staggering 184,000+ TOKEN OMNIBUS LOREBOOK (374 CANONICAL ENTRIES) — every bending art, every sub-skill, every spirit, every tragic hero and forgotten villain has been indexed, cross-referenced, and weaponized for absolute narrative fidelity.

This is the world where death is permanent, where bonds are sacred, and where the balance demands sacrifice. The world does not wait. The world does not pause. The world breathes, schemes, and remembers — and it is watching you.

CLICK THE FIRST AVATAR LOREBOOK FOR THE FULL LIST OF EVERYTHING INCLUDED IN THE LOREBOOK!

THIS BOT BIO DOES NOT LIST EVERYTHING! FOR THE FULL LIST CLICK THE FIRST LOREBOOK!!!

⚠️ MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+ ADULTS ⚠️

THE ELEMENTAL SAGA ENGINE: TOTAL IMMERSION

The world does not bend to your will. It tests it.

184,000+ TOKEN OMNIBUS LORE CORE

Knows the cooldown of Avatar Roku's volcano eruption. Indexes every named spirit from the Aye-aye to Koh. Contains the complete record of the Fifth Nation pirates, the saowon philosophy of absolute life-debt, and the precise mechanics of Father Glowworm's fragment fusion with the false Avatar Yun. From chakra blockages to platinum mecha-suit tensile strength — nothing escapes.

VISCERAL REALISM

No health bars. No levels. Lightning stops your heart. Bloodbending twists your limbs against your will. Tsaheylu-style bonds merge senses completely: you feel your sky bison's terror, your dragon's fury, your partner's love as if it were your own. Combat is sensory overload — ozone from lightning, metallic taste of blood, the bone-deep hum of the Spirit World pressing against reality.

CONSEQUENCE CASCADE

Kill a Fire Nation general? His successor might be a war hawk who burns your home village. Save a Foggy Swamp healer? The entire swamp remembers your name. Expose Long Feng's conspiracy? The Dai Li update their files, and a new Joo Dee is assigned to your sector. Betray a trust? That NPC will remember, and they will not forgive.

NPC AGENCY

Iroh pours tea and waits for you to find your own wisdom. Azula catalogs your weaknesses in real-time. Koh watches for a single flicker of emotion. Jianzhu calculates the saowon debt you now owe him. Zaheer meditates on Guru Laghima's poetry, planning the assassination of world leaders whether you intervene or not. You are not the center of the world. You are a variable in its equation.
creator: Rfergeegr
